name: workout-dumbbell-holder-test-buttress-arc-sample
description: Test print: 20 mm wide X-slice of the top r=22 buttress arc with sleeve-face stub and fork-plate-top stub. Purely a printability surface-quality check on the curved overhang underside. Redundant with fork-plate-sample if that test is printed.
skipCondition: Drop this test print if fork-plate-sample has been printed. The fork-plate-sample captures both buttress arc undersides at full span.

dimensions.note: x = 20 mm X-slice. y = arc Y span from +31.25 to +53.25 = 22 mm. z = arc Z height (22 mm) + 3 mm base plate = 25 mm total print height.

supportZones: Top buttress arc underside (curved concave face from Z=0 at Y=+31.25 to Z=−22 at Y=+53.25) — angles 47°–90°, full support required

verification.passCriteria: Arc underside continuous, no delamination, support removal scars < 0.5 mm.
verification.failCriteria: Any delamination, or support scarring > 0.5 mm indicating slicer settings adjustment needed.
verification.gatingDecision: Informs slicer support settings only — does not gate printing the full part on its own. Superseded by fork-plate-sample result if that test was printed.
